subject: Re:
body:
this does not work at all.. there are only four chaises , as opposed to eight. there is no place to get sun in the morning-  there is not enought room for eight people/ it is limiting as opposed to expansive. the idea was to moveout of the wind  and have sun and pool access.

this does not work at all.. there are only four chaises , as opposed to eight. there is no place to get sun in the morning- there is not enought room for eight people/ it is limiting as opposed to expansive. the idea was to moveout of the wind and have sun and pool access.
